seoTitle: Deans Marsh vs Dederang — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Deans Marsh and Dederang. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Deans Marsh vs Dederang: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Deans Marsh and Dederang.
heading: Deans Marsh vs Dederang — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Deans Marsh, Victoria and Dederang, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Deans Marsh has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Dederang (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Deans Marsh or Dederang safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Deans Marsh has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Dederang scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Deans Marsh scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Dederang scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Deans Marsh or Dederang?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Deans Marsh has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
